title: Rankett dashboard — fdsfsd test agency, $0/mo client revenue
html:
Rankett agency dashboard logged in as "fdsfsd" test tenant (fdsfsd.visibility.rankett.com) — Starter plan, $0/mo client revenue, Setup 3/7, "Add your first client" empty state, "Your personalized Blueprint is ready: tailored playbook for selling AI visibility to your clients" sales-kit panel. Sidebar: Dashboard / Clients / Onboarding / Optimizations / Leads / Branding / Custom Domain / Pitch Deck / Sales Kits / Referrals / Settings / Billing. URL flag admin_denied=true — Yahir testing the non-admin agency view.

TL;DR

  • Rankett empty-state agency dashboard captured with Starter plan, fully-built nav (10+ sections).
  • "Personalized Blueprint" sales-kit feature is part of the agency onboarding.
  • admin_denied=true shows the access-control split between Rankett internal admin and agency tenant.

rankett · ghost white label · ai visibility engine · diddles
